issue_title: formatSalaryRange shows 'null' when salary amount is below range size
issue_body: ## Bug `formatSalaryRange({ amount: 35000, type: 'month' })` returns `'月薪 null ~ 6萬'` instead of the expected `'月薪 0 ~ 6萬'`. https://www.goodjob.life/companies/%E9%BA%A5%E7%95%B6%E5%8B%9E ## Root Cause In `src/components/common/formatter.js`, `getSalaryAmountRangeSize('month')` returns `60000` as the range size. For any amount below 60,000: ``` head = Math.floor(35000 / 60000) * 60000 = 0 ``` `numToChineseReadableString(0)` returns `null` (it guards `num <= 0`), and the template literal in `formatSalaryAmountRange` converts `null` to the string `"null"`. ## Steps to Reproduce ```js formatSalaryRange({ amount: 35000, type: 'month' }) // returns '月薪 null ~ 6萬' ``` ## Expected ``` '月薪 0 ~ 6萬' ```
